title: Dental Vision Benchmark
description: A small, clinician-reviewed, contamination-aware benchmark of non-radiographic dental image reading: 90 openly licensed dental images (diagrams and clinical photographs), six vision language models, caption-free input with a leakage guard, dual independent image-grounded judges, paired statistics, and independent clinician validation. The benchmark code is MIT; images keep their own open licenses.

creators.name: Robles Cantero, Daniel
creators.affiliation: Universidad Europea Miguel de Cervantes (UEMC), Valladolid, Spain
